channel.title: GNmaster
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from GNmaster, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Meghan Trainor on Resilience, Wellness, and Developing Healthier Habits
item.description: Meghan Trainor discusses filtering out public criticism, focusing on her physical health, and building consistent routines that support her well-being.

item.title: What Adequate Daily Hydration Does to the Human Body
Delta and United Cards Unlock Discounted Award Flights; Other Airlines May Follow
item.description: United and Delta cardholders now have access to discounted award redemptions. Analysts are watching whether other airline loyalty programs will adopt a similar approach.

item.title: A 17-Hour Review of United's Polaris Business Class Suites to Singapore
item.description: United's transpacific route to Singapore's Changi Airport served as the operational debut of the carrier's redesigned Boeing 787-9 Dreamliner business class cabin.

item.title: How Buying Hotel Points During a Promotion Helped Cover a Flight
item.description: Facing a shortfall in airline miles, a traveler found a cost-effective solution by purchasing Marriott Bonvoy points during a promotional offer.
